# Invest Spain Property

> Independent research on Spain property investment for UK and European buyers.

- Site: https://invest-spain-property.com
- Contact: info@invest-spain-property.com
- Markets: Costa Blanca, Costa del Sol, Balearic Islands
- Focus: NIE, net rental yields, post-Golden Visa residency, off-plan bank guarantees
- Not a developer, not a listing portal

## Key guides (batch 1 — publishing)
- /guides/spain-property-investment-guide/
- /guides/buy-property-spain-foreigner/
- /guides/spain-golden-visa-ended-2025/

- /projects/the-kove/
